title: MineBeench
description: Check your computer's performance with Minecraft!
body:
# MineBench
### Test your computer's performance with Minecraft!

# Bench Guide
#### 1. First, open NeoForge Minecraft with MineBeench and change the video settings as shown below. (Or use the [options.txt](https://github.com/Zeetheer/minebeench/blob/main/options.txt) to your local Minecraft).
#### ![Video Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HTRVf25Y/images/4b65e18ddb5c2582295a10563197473bddf11c18.png)
#### 2. Second, create a new world using the settings below.
#### ![Map Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HTRVf25Y/images/c827023e94653b89bcf8567941e2c4a1061f5f0a.png)
#### ![Map Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HTRVf25Y/images/4c0cb7e61cb262dad9439338baa0c65aceb53e81.png)
#### 3. Third, run the command "/setbenchrule".
#### 4. Fourth, after the message "Setting is done." is displayed, run the command "/startbench".
#### 5. Fifth, if Minecraft crashes and shuts down, go to the logs folder in your local Minecraft Log folder and check lastest.log. 
(e.g. C:\Users\UserName\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\logs\latest.log).
#### 6. Finally, the number ending in mbs at the end of latest.log is the benchmark result of your MineBench test.

# Warning
### PLEASE DO NOT USE ANY OTHER MODS.
The numbers shown in chat may not be accurate. Please check the log for detailed numbers.

# Bench score
**CPU and video card redirects are not advertisements or solicitations to purchase. This is for reference only.**
> #### CPU: [AMD Ryzen™ 5 9600X](https://www.amd.com/en/products/processors/desktops/ryzen/9000-series/amd-ryzen-5-9600x.html), GPU: [NVIDA GeForce RTX™ 4070 SUPER](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/geforce/graphics-cards/40-series/rtx-4070-family/), RAM: [TeamGroup DDR5-5600 CL46 Elite(16GBx2)]([https://www.teamgroupinc.com/en/product-detail/memory/TEAMGROUP/elite-u-dimm-ddr5/elite-u-dimm-ddr5-TED532G5600C46DC01/](https://www.teamgroupinc.com/en/product-detail/memory/TEAMGROUP/elite-u-dimm-ddr5/elite-u-dimm-ddr5-TED532G5600C46DC01/)), Max RAM: [20GB](https://github.com/Zeetheer/minebeench/issues/1#issuecomment-2660955035), MineBeench Version: [1.0.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/minebeench/version/1.0.0) => 605,841mbs

[Please share your benchmarks!](https://github.com/Zeetheer/minebeench/issues/1)
